homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track by Kamil Muzyk delivers an upbeat and energetic atmosphere driven by a steady drum machine beat and a simple bassline. A repetitive synth lead melody creates a strong retro feel that evokes nostalgia, making the music ideal for lively video game soundtracks. Although cymbals and mallet percussion are detected, the core sound remains defined by its synthesizer textures and dance-oriented rhythm.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends industrial and electronic rock elements with a driving, repetitive rhythm that creates an intense atmosphere. Featuring prominent synthesizers and a strong beat, the up-tempo music builds an aggressive energy suitable for video game combat or high-energy workouts.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This live performance is a raw, high-energy display of hardcore and street punk music played in Los Angeles. Distorted guitars and aggressive drum patterns drive the track toward a climactic moment of extreme combat intensity. The chaotic energy reflects the band's identity as a Latino act delivering their signature noisy sound at an underground venue.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: Dark Husky delivers a loud and aggressive instrumental rock track titled "Cold Warriors," driven by an energetic electric guitar, bass, and drums. The song features a strong, medium-tempo beat that creates an intense and high-octane atmosphere perfect for action sequences. Although the title suggests a darker tone, the music remains strictly rhythmic and powerful without any vocal elements.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental rock track features a live, fast-paced drum solo filled with complex fills and cymbal crashes. A simple bass line supports the driving rhythm while an electric guitar plays gritty power chords throughout the energetic performance. The song captures the raw, punk-influenced energy characteristic of Ratpigeon's later glam-metal inspired sound.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
